hero.description: Full Stack Engineer focused on predictable delivery, production stability, and reducing operational overhead in high-volume systems.

about.title: A bit about me
paragraphs: Hi, I'm Aravindhan Govindaraj. I'm a Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of experience delivering enterprise-grade web platforms and modernization initiatives. My primary focus is on predictable delivery, production stability, and significantly reducing operational overhead.

In my current role at Infosys, I've demonstrated velocity in feature development and cross-team collaboration, applying scalable UI patterns and backend performance optimizations that have reduced query latency by 45% and automated over 70% of manual effort.

timeline.title: Technology Analyst (Full Stack)
bullets: Led development of high-volume licensing workflow automation for Supply Manager, eliminating 70% manual operations and improving compliance reliability across 10K+ monthly transactions.
Optimized large dataset SQL workflows, reducing query latency by 45% and stabilizing API response SLAs for 10K+ concurrent users.
Engineered REST APIs in Spring Boot to support multi-step data validation processes, improving backend reliability in latency-sensitive workflows.
Modernized Java and Angular applications to LTS versions (Java 21, Angular 16), cutting build times and reducing dependency conflicts.
Built a shared UI component library (15+ reusable Angular components) and service-based RxJS state flows, reducing code duplication by 20%.

education.subtitle: Education
education.title: Academic background
education.school: Sri Sai Ram Institute of Technology
achievements: Recognized by client leadership for driving backend performance improvements that reduced incident tickets and improved SLA adherence.
Delivered workflow features on compressed timelines for business-critical releases.

items.title: Supply Manager
items.description: E-commerce platform with high-volume licensing workflow automation. Eliminated 70% manual operations and improved compliance reliability across 10K+ monthly transactions.

items.title: Central Pay
items.description: Healthcare data processing platform with bulk claim handling. Developed SQL stored procedures to detect and resolve adjustment errors, reducing claim inaccuracies by 15%.

items.title: Infosys Data Suite
items.description: Data migration platform with automated ETL API workflows for generating source-to-target mappings. Reduced manual mapping time and eliminated human error in data migration processes.

contact.subtitle: Contact
